# Leaflet 1.9.4 runtime distribution

This directory contains the unmodified runtime files from the official Leaflet 1.9.4 release archive plus the upstream license from the `v1.9.4` tag.

- Release: `https://github.com/Leaflet/Leaflet/releases/tag/v1.9.4`
- Archive: `https://github.com/Leaflet/Leaflet/releases/download/v1.9.4/leaflet.zip`
- Retrieval date: 2026-07-22
- License: BSD 2-Clause, preserved in `LICENSE`
- Inventory: `leaflet.css`, `leaflet.js`, five required image assets, and license
- Integrity: SHA-256 values are recorded in `SHA256SUMS`

No CDN or runtime package retrieval is used. See `docs/dependencies/leaflet.md` for the update procedure and design-system staging notes.
